body.title: agent_datacenter README — kit-assembly guide for a fresh Claude building their own Igor
body.description:
Document the agent_datacenter as a kit a fresh Claude (working for someone else) can use to assemble their own Igor-shaped agent. Lives at agent_datacenter root README.

Shipped agent_datacenter@5499a9a — README rewritten 41 → 296 lines; covers all 8 areas: hierarchy (clan/instance/COA + home_db/local_db + swarm-box), bus shape (envelopes + comms:// addresses + announce protocol), two plug-in shapes (DatacenterClient + MCP wrapper), shims + agentctl + skill installer + RsyncBackend, profile YAML + __replace__ inheritance, what is NOT in the kit (cognition + seed memory), 5-minute smoke test, component file map. Phase status table updated to reflect actual state. Test plan per ticket: Akien-readthrough — pushed to main so review happens against landed copy.

**Note:** ticket appears to have been lost from queue.json mid-session (write race during inventory edit of T-docs-live-code-rollout). Re-filed as done to reflect the shipped work.
